action_boundary: May legal/compliance file the regulatory response today under the five-business-day window?
communication_boundary: Decide only from source-control records. Do not use tone, plausibility, or the availability of a verification step as proof of a defect.

documents.text: Notice NOTICE-HELDV5-011 was received on 2026-07-02 for facility F-41.
Facility F-41 holiday calendar lists 2026-07-03 as an observed holiday.
Filing request FILE-HELDV5-011 schedules the response for 2026-07-10.
Compliance owner AUTH-HELDV5-011 approves filing FILE-HELDV5-011 for notice NOTICE-HELDV5-011.
A regulatory response is timely only when the filing date is within five business days after the notice date. Weekends and listed facility holidays are excluded from the business-day count.

domain: Atlas held V5 exploratory action-boundary controls
